criteria.label: Load a CSV with explicit dtypes, date parsing, and column selection.
criteria.example: Write read_csv on transactions.csv with usecols for four fields, dtype for IDs as string and label as int8, and parse_dates on the timestamp column.

criteria.label: Load Parquet with selective columns and report memory in MB.
criteria.example: read_parquet on clicks.parquet with columns=["user_id", "item_id", "label"], then print memory_usage(deep=True).sum() / 1e6.

criteria.label: Identify and fix a dtype inference bug on an ID column.
criteria.example: Given order_id as float64 showing 42.0, reload with dtype={"order_id": "string"} and show head() preserves leading zeros.

criteria.label: Load JSON Lines and flatten nested fields to a typed DataFrame.
criteria.example: read_json(events.jsonl, lines=True), json_normalize nested properties, astype event_name to category.

criteria.label: Demonstrate split-at-load awareness without leaking train statistics.
criteria.example: Load full parquet, sort by date, slice train/holdout by index, compute fillna mean on train only, apply that mean to holdout.
